hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,datetime,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); fp=ti.get('file_path',ti.get('path','unknown')); cwd=os.getcwd(); rel=os.path.relpath(fp,cwd) if fp!='unknown' else fp; print('\u2713 ' + datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S') + ' wrote ' + rel)" >> claude-state.md
